# EVA BILINGUAL AI 
Eva Education - Tutora Bilingue AI - GFS Crew
[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/29898337/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
<!-- Build-1783693882: v3 1783693520 v2 -->
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=5.0">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#4F7DF3">
<meta name="description" content="Mrs. Eva© — Tutora Bilingüe con IA que transforma el aula dominicana. Presentado por GFS Crew.">
<meta property="og:title" content="Mrs. Eva© — Tutora Bilingüe AI">
<meta property="og:description" content="Transformando el aula dominicana para formar la generación bilingüe del futuro.">
<meta property="og:image" content="data:image/jpeg;base64,">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<meta name="build" content="8bc491608f69">
<title>Mrs. Eva© — Tutora Bilingüe AI | Eva Education©</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

:root {
    --eva-blue: #4F7DF3;
    --eva-blue-dark: #3B5FD9;
    --eva-green: #10B981;
    --eva-purple: #A78BFA;
    --eva-purple-dark: #8B5CF6;
    --eva-orange: #F59E0B;
    --eva-pink: #EC4899;
    --bg-soft: #FAFBFF;
    --text-dark: #1E293B;
    --text-medium: #475569;
    --text-light: #64748B;
    --white: #FFFFFF;
    --shadow-sm: 0 2px 8px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.08);
    --shadow-md: 0 8px 24px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.12);
    --shadow-lg: 0 16px 48px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.18);
}

html { scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
body {
    font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif;
    background: var(--bg-soft);
    color: var(--text-dark);
    line-height: 1.6;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; }

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   LOADER — Mrs. Eva© aparece primero
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
#loader {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667EEA 0%, #764BA2 50%, #4F7DF3 100%);
    z-index: 9999;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    transition: opacity 0.8s ease, visibility 0.8s ease;
    padding: 20px;
}
#loader.hidden { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; }

.loader-clouds {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    pointer-events: none;
}
.cloud {
    position: absolute;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    border-radius: 50px;
    filter: blur(2px);
    animation: floatCloud 25s infinite linear;
}
.cloud:nth-child(1) { width: 100px; height: 30px; top: 15%; left: -100px; animation-duration: 28s; }
.cloud:nth-child(2) { width: 140px; height: 40px; top: 35%; left: -140px; animation-duration: 32s; animation-delay: -10s; }
.cloud:nth-child(3) { width: 80px; height: 25px; top: 65%; left: -80px; animation-duration: 26s; animation-delay: -5s; }
.cloud:nth-child(4) { width: 120px; height: 35px; top: 82%; left: -120px; animation-duration: 30s; animation-delay: -18s; }

@keyframes floatCloud {
    from { transform: translateX(0); }
    to { transform: translateX(calc(100vw + 200px)); }
}

.eva-character {
    width: 220px;
    max-width: 60vw;
    position: relative;
    animation: floatEva 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 15px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.25));
}
.eva-character img {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
}
@keyframes floatEva {
    0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-1.5deg); }
    50% { transform: translateY(-18px) rotate(1.5deg); }
}

.eva-shadow {
    width: 140px;
    height: 20px;
    background: radial-gradient(ellipse, rgba(0,0,0,0.35), transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
    margin-top: -10px;
    animation: shadowPulse 3.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes shadowPulse {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.6; }
    50% { transform: scale(0.8); opacity: 0.4; }
}

.loader-title {
    color: white;
    font-size: 30px;
    font-weight: 900;
    margin-top: 30px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    animation: fadeInUp 1s ease 0.3s both;
    text-align: center;
}
.loader-title sup { font-size: 14px; opacity: 0.85; vertical-align: super; }
.loader-subtitle {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.95);
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    animation: fadeInUp 1s ease 0.5s both;
    text-align: center;
}
.loader-hello {
    color: white;
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-top: 22px;
    padding: 10px 24px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.18);
    border-radius: 30px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    animation: fadeInUp 1s ease 0.8s both, pulseHello 2s ease-in-out infinite 1.5s;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
}

@keyframes fadeInUp {
    from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
    to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
}
@keyframes pulseHello {
    0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
    50% { transform: scale(1.05); }
}

.loader-progress {
    width: 220px;
    max-width: 60vw;
    height: 4px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    border-radius: 2px;
    margin-top: 28px;
    overflow: hidden;
    animation: fadeInUp 1s ease 1s both;
}
.loader-progress-bar {
    height: 100%;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #FFF, #FDE68A);
    border-radius: 2px;
    animation: loadProgress 3.2s ease-in-out forwards;
}
@keyframes loadProgress {
    0% { width: 0%; }
    100% { width: 100%; }
}

.loader-tap {
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-top: 16px;
    animation: fadeInUp 1s ease 2s both;
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.hero {
    position: relative;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667EEA 0%, #764BA2 100%);
    padding: 60px 20px 80px;
    color: white;
    text-align: center;
    overflow: hidden;
}
.hero::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 20% 20%, rgba(255,255,255,0.15) 0%, transparent 40%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 80% 80%, rgba(167,139,250,0.3) 0%, transparent 40%);
    pointer-events: none;
}
.hero-content {
    position: relative;
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: 0 auto;
}
.hero-logo {
    width: 90px;
    height: 90px;
    margin: 0 auto 20px;
    border-radius: 22px;
    background: white;
    padding: 12px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}
.hero-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }

.hero-badge {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    color: white;
    padding: 6px 16px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.3);
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease 0.1s both;
}
.hero h1 {
    font-size: clamp(28px, 6.5vw, 46px);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.15;
    letter-spacing: -1px;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease 0.2s both;
}
.hero h1 .highlight {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FDE68A, #FBBF24);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}
.hero p.subtitle {
    font-size: clamp(15px, 3.8vw, 18px);
    opacity: 0.95;
    max-width: 550px;
    margin: 0 auto 30px;
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease 0.3s both;
}
.hero-cta {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    background: white;
    color: var(--eva-blue-dark);
    padding: 14px 28px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.25);
    animation: fadeInUp 0.8s ease 0.4s both, pulseCTA 2.5s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}
.hero-cta:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
@keyframes pulseCTA {
    0%, 100% { box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.25); }
    50% { box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(253, 230, 138, 0.5); }
}

.hero-illustration {
    margin-top: 40px;
    animation: fadeInUp 1s ease 0.5s both;
}
.hero-illustration img {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 500px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    border-radius: 20px;
    box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════
   SECTIONS
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════ */
.container {
    max-width: 700px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    padding: 0 20px;
}

section {
    padding: 50px 0;
}

.section-eyebrow {
    display: inline-block;
    color: var(--eva-blue);
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.section-title {
    font-size: clamp(24px, 5.8vw, 32px);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.2;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.section-subtitle {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--text-medium);
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Message block */
.message-block {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EEF2FF 0%, #F3E8FF 100%);
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 30px 24px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}
.message-block::before {
    content: '"';
    position: absolute;
    top: -20px;
    left: 10px;
    font-size: 120px;
    color: var(--eva-purple);
    opacity: 0.2;
    font-family: Georgia, serif;
    line-height: 1;
}
.message-block p {
    position: relative;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.message-block p:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
.message-block strong { color: var(--eva-purple-dark); }

/* Feature cards */
.feature-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 16px;
}
.feature-card {
    background: white;
    border-radius: 20px;
    padding: 24px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    border: 1px solid rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.08);
    transition: transform 0.3s;
}
.feature-card:active { transform: scale(0.98); }
.feature-icon {
    width: 52px;
    height: 52px;
    border-radius: 14px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 26px;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--eva-blue), var(--eva-purple));
    color: white;
}
.feature-card.green .feature-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #10B981, #34D399); }
.feature-card.orange .feature-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F59E0B, #FBBF24); }
.feature-card.pink .feature-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #EC4899, #F472B6); }
.feature-card.purple .feature-icon { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #8B5CF6, #A78BFA); }

.feature-card h3 {
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 6px;
}
.feature-card p {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-medium);
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Featured (Mrs Eva© & Gamification) */
.featured-section {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4F7DF3 0%, #8B5CF6 100%);
    border-radius: 28px;
    padding: 36px 24px;
    color: white;
    margin: 30px 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
}
.featured-section::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -50px;
    right: -50px;
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.2), transparent 70%);
    border-radius: 50%;
}
.featured-star {
    display: inline-block;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.2);
    padding: 4px 12px;
    border-radius: 20px;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: 14px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}
.featured-section h2 {
    font-size: clamp(22px, 5.2vw, 28px);
    font-weight: 800;
    line-height: 1.2;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    position: relative;
}
.featured-section > p {
    font-size: 15px;
    opacity: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}
.featured-list {
    list-style: none;
    position: relative;
}
.featured-list li {
    padding: 12px 0 12px 32px;
    position: relative;
    font-size: 15px;
    line-height: 1.5;
    border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);
}
.featured-list li:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.featured-list li::before {
    content: '✓';
    position: absolute;
    left: 0;
    top: 12px;
    width: 22px;
    height: 22px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.25);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
}
.featured-section.orange { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F59E0B 0%, #EC4899 100%); }

/* Screenshot showcase */
.screenshot {
    margin: 20px 0;
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
    border: 1px solid rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.1);
    background: white;
}
.screenshot img {
    width: 100%;
    display: block;
    image-rendering: -webkit-optimize-contrast;
    image-rendering: crisp-edges;
}
.screenshot-caption {
    padding: 12px 16px;
    background: var(--bg-soft);
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-light);
    text-align: center;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Small Mrs Eva© avatar next to sections */
.mini-eva {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    display: inline-block;
    vertical-align: middle;
    margin-right: 12px;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 4px 12px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.3));
}

/* Timeline */
.timeline {
    position: relative;
    padding-left: 30px;
    margin: 30px 0;
}
.timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 10px;
    top: 8px;
    bottom: 8px;
    width: 3px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--eva-blue), var(--eva-purple), var(--eva-orange));
    border-radius: 2px;
}
.timeline-item {
    position: relative;
    padding-bottom: 20px;
}
.timeline-item::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: -26px;
    top: 4px;
    width: 15px;
    height: 15px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: white;
    border: 3px solid var(--eva-blue);
    box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.2);
}
.timeline-item:nth-child(2)::before { border-color: var(--eva-purple); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(167, 139, 250, 0.2); }
.timeline-item:nth-child(3)::before { border-color: var(--eva-green); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(16, 185, 129, 0.2); }
.timeline-item:nth-child(4)::before { border-color: var(--eva-orange); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.2); }

.timeline-stage {
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--eva-blue);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.timeline-title {
    font-size: 17px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}
.timeline-desc {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: var(--text-medium);
}

/* Impact grid */
.impact-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap: 12px;
    margin-top: 20px;
}
.impact-card {
    background: white;
    padding: 18px 14px;
    border-radius: 16px;
    text-align: center;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
    border: 1px solid rgba(79, 125, 243, 0.08);
}
.impact-icon { font-size: 32px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.impact-title {
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    line-height: 1.3;
}

/* Final CTA */
.final-cta {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #1E293B 0%, #4F7DF3 100%);
    color: white;
    padding: 50px 24px;
    text-align: center;
    border-radius: 28px;
    margin: 30px 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}
.final-cta::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    background:
        radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(167,139,250,0.4), transparent 50%),
        radial-gradient(circle at 70% 70%, rgba(245,158,11,0.3), transparent 50%);
}
.final-cta-content { position: relative; }
.final-cta h2 {
    font-size: clamp(22px, 5.2vw, 30px);
    font-weight: 900;
    line-height: 1.25;
    margin-bottom: 16px;
    letter-spacing: -0.5px;
}
.final-cta h2 span {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FDE68A, #FBBF24);
    -webkit-background-clip: text;
    -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
    background-clip: text;
}
.final-cta p {
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.95;
    margin-bottom: 28px;
    max-width: 500px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
}

/* Share buttons */
.share-buttons {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 10px;
    max-width: 320px;
    margin: 0 auto;
}
.share-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    padding: 14px 20px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-weight: 700;
    font-size: 15px;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: transform 0.2s;
    border: none;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
}
.share-btn:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
.share-btn.whatsapp { background: #25D366; color: white; }
.share-btn.primary { background: white; color: var(--eva-blue-dark); }
.share-btn.outline {
    background: transparent;
    color: white;
    border: 2px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
}

/* Contact Section */
.contact-section {
    padding: 50px 20px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #F0FDF4 0%, #DBEAFE 100%);
    text-align: center;
}
.contact-card {
    max-width: 500px;
    margin: 0 auto;
    background: white;
    border-radius: 24px;
    padding: 36px 24px;
    box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    border: 2px solid rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.15);
}
.contact-icon-large {
    width: 72px;
    height: 72px;
    margin: 0 auto 16px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366, #128C7E);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.35);
}
.contact-icon-large svg { width: 40px; height: 40px; fill: white; }
.contact-card h3 {
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: var(--text-dark);
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    letter-spacing: -0.3px;
}
.contact-card p {
    font-size: 15px;
    color: var(--text-medium);
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}
.contact-number {
    display: inline-block;
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 800;
    color: #128C7E;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
}
.contact-btn-big {
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366, #128C7E);
    color: white;
    padding: 16px 32px;
    border-radius: 50px;
    font-weight: 800;
    font-size: 16px;
    text-decoration: none;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.4);
    transition: transform 0.2s;
}
.contact-btn-big:active { transform: scale(0.97); }
.contact-btn-big svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; fill: white; }
.contact-note {
    margin-top: 16px;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: var(--text-light);
}

/* Footer */
footer {
    padding: 30px 20px;
    text-align: center;
    background: #0F172A;
    color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7);
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.7;
}
footer strong { color: white; }
footer .footer-brand {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
}
footer .footer-brand img { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 10px; background: white; padding: 4px; }
footer .footer-brand span { color: white; font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px; }
footer .copyright-notice {
    margin-top: 14px;
    font-size: 11px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 12px 16px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
    border-radius: 12px;
    max-width: 500px;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
}

/* Sticky floating share button */
.floating-share {
    position: fixed;
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #25D366, #128C7E);
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(37, 211, 102, 0.4);
    z-index: 100;
    cursor: pointer;
    animation: pulseCTA 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    text-decoration: none;
}
.floating-share svg { width: 30px; height: 30px; fill: white; }

/* Desktop tweaks */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    .feature-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    .impact-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
    .share-buttons { flex-direction: row; max-width: none; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
    .share-btn { flex: 0 1 auto; padding: 14px 28px; }
}
@media (min-width: 1024px) {
    .impact-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); }
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     LOADER: Mrs. Eva© (imagen real)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="loader">
    <div class="loader-clouds">
        <div class="cloud"></div>
        <div class="cloud"></div>
        <div class="cloud"></div>
        <div class="cloud"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="eva-character">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Mrs. Eva©">
    </div>
    <div class="eva-shadow"></div>

    <div class="loader-title">Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup></div>
    <div class="loader-subtitle">Tutora Bilingüe con Inteligencia Artificial</div>
    <div class="loader-hello">¡Hola! Preparando tu experiencia…</div>

    <div class="loader-progress">
        <div class="loader-progress-bar"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="loader-tap">Toca la pantalla para continuar</div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     HERO
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<header class="hero">
    <div class="hero-content">
        <div class="hero-logo">
            <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Eva Education© Logo">
        </div>
        <div class="hero-badge">🇩🇴 Presentado por GFS Crew</div>
        <h1>El futuro de nuestros hijos <span class="highlight">habla dos idiomas</span></h1>
        <p class="subtitle">Transformando el aula dominicana con Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup>, una tutora bilingüe con IA que acompaña a cada estudiante desde el primer grado hasta la universidad.</p>
        <a href="#conoce" class="hero-cta">
            <span>Conoce a Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup></span>
            <span>↓</span>
        </a>

        <div class="hero-illustration">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Mrs. Eva© con estudiantes dominicanos">
        </div>
    </div>
</header>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     MESSAGE
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section id="conoce">
    <div class="container">
        <span class="section-eyebrow">Un Mensaje Para República Dominicana</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Cada niño dominicano merece dominar dos idiomas</h2>

        <div class="message-block">
            <p>El <strong>bilingüismo</strong> ya no es un lujo: es la llave que abre puertas al mundo globalizado. Al turismo, a la tecnología, a las mejores universidades, a una vida con más oportunidades.</p>
            <p>República Dominicana tiene el <strong>talento</strong>. Ahora tiene la herramienta pedagógica para materializarlo.</p>
            <p><strong>Eva Education<sup>©</sup></strong> es más que una plataforma: es una compañera de aprendizaje que camina junto al estudiante desde la primaria hasta la universidad, corrigiendo, motivando y celebrando cada logro.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     WHAT IS EVA©
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <span class="section-eyebrow">¿Qué es Eva Education<sup>©</sup>?</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Una plataforma pedagógica integral con IA</h2>
        <p class="section-subtitle">Diseñada para transformar la enseñanza dentro y fuera del aula, integrando todas las herramientas que el maestro y el estudiantado necesitan.</p>

        <div class="feature-grid">
            <div class="feature-card">
                <div class="feature-icon">🤖</div>
                <h3>Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup></h3>
                <p>Tutora bilingüe conversacional con IA que interactúa en español e inglés.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="feature-card green">
                <div class="feature-icon">📅</div>
                <h3>Planificación Inteligente</h3>
                <p>Planes de clase generados automáticamente por IA para el maestro.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="feature-card orange">
                <div class="feature-icon">🎮</div>
                <h3>Gamificación Adaptativa</h3>
                <p>Retos escalados según el rendimiento real del estudiante.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="feature-card pink">
                <div class="feature-icon">📊</div>
                <h3>Gestión Completa</h3>
                <p>Calendario, clases, evaluaciones e indicadores en un solo lugar.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="screenshot">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Panel del Maestro de Eva Education©">
            <div class="screenshot-caption">Panel del Maestro — Vista completa de la actividad docente</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     MRS EVA© FEATURED
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <div class="featured-section">
            <span class="featured-star">⭐ Corazón de la plataforma</span>
            <h2>Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup>: la tutora que corrige al instante</h2>
            <p>Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup> conversa directamente con cada estudiante y lo guía en tiempo real:</p>
            <ul class="featured-list">
                <li>Corrige la <strong>pronunciación, gramática y comprensión</strong> mientras el estudiante habla.</li>
                <li>Adapta el nivel del diálogo al grado y ritmo de cada niño.</li>
                <li>Retroalimentación inmediata que acelera el aprendizaje.</li>
                <li>Nunca juzga: <strong>motiva, guía y celebra</strong> cada logro.</li>
                <li>Disponible <strong>24/7</strong>, dentro y fuera del aula.</li>
                <li>Enseña <strong>español, inglés, matemáticas, ciencias</strong> y más.</li>
            </ul>
        </div>

        <div class="screenshot">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Panel del estudiante con Mrs. Eva©">
            <div class="screenshot-caption">Panel del Estudiante — Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup> lista para conversar</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     GAMIFICATION FEATURED
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <div class="featured-section orange">
            <span class="featured-star">⭐ Aprendizaje que engancha</span>
            <h2>Gamificación con reto escalado</h2>
            <p>Aprender se convierte en una experiencia de juego con propósito pedagógico:</p>
            <ul class="featured-list">
                <li>El sistema <strong>evalúa el rendimiento</strong> en cada interacción.</li>
                <li>Los retos <strong>suben o bajan de dificultad</strong> automáticamente.</li>
                <li>Insignias, logros y niveles motivan la constancia diaria.</li>
                <li>Resultados pedagógicos <strong>más rápidos y eficientes</strong>.</li>
                <li>El maestro visualiza el progreso en indicadores en tiempo real.</li>
            </ul>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     LONGITUDINAL JOURNEY
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <span class="section-eyebrow">Acompañamiento de por vida</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Desde la primaria hasta la universidad</h2>
        <p class="section-subtitle">Eva Education<sup>©</sup> recuerda el progreso, las fortalezas y las áreas de mejora de cada estudiante, año tras año. Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup> evoluciona junto a él.</p>

        <div class="timeline">
            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-stage">Primaria</div>
                <div class="timeline-title">Bases sólidas del bilingüismo</div>
                <div class="timeline-desc">Primer contacto con inglés a través de juegos, canciones y conversaciones guiadas por Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup>.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-stage">Secundaria</div>
                <div class="timeline-title">Fluidez y confianza</div>
                <div class="timeline-desc">Conversaciones más complejas, escritura académica y preparación para exámenes internacionales.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-stage">Preparatoria</div>
                <div class="timeline-title">Dominio académico</div>
                <div class="timeline-desc">Inglés académico avanzado, listo para universidades locales e internacionales.</div>
            </div>
            <div class="timeline-item">
                <div class="timeline-stage">Universidad y vida profesional</div>
                <div class="timeline-title">Oportunidades sin fronteras</div>
                <div class="timeline-desc">Preparación para el mundo laboral bilingüe: turismo, tecnología, negocios internacionales.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     TEACHER TOOLS
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <span class="section-eyebrow">Herramientas del Maestro</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">El maestro dominicano, potenciado</h2>
        <p class="section-subtitle">Eva Education<sup>©</sup> libera al maestro de tareas administrativas para que se enfoque en lo que más importa: enseñar.</p>

        <div class="feature-grid">
            <div class="feature-card">
                <div class="feature-icon">🧠</div>
                <h3>Planificación por IA</h3>
                <p>Planes semanales generados automáticamente.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="feature-card green">
                <div class="feature-icon">📈</div>
                <h3>Indicadores en Vivo</h3>
                <p>Rendimiento por estudiante y por grupo.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="feature-card purple">
                <div class="feature-icon">📆</div>
                <h3>Calendario Integrado</h3>
                <p>Horarios, evaluaciones y actividades.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="feature-card orange">
                <div class="feature-icon">✍️</div>
                <h3>Evaluaciones</h3>
                <p>Creación y corrección asistida por IA.</p>
            </div>
        </div>

        <div class="screenshot">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Planificación Semanal de Eva Education©">
            <div class="screenshot-caption">Planificación Semanal generada por IA</div>
        </div>

        <div class="screenshot">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gestión de Clases de Eva Education©">
            <div class="screenshot-caption">Gestión de Clases por grado y materia</div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     IMPACT
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <span class="section-eyebrow">Impacto esperado</span>
        <h2 class="section-title">Lo que Eva Education<sup>©</sup> traerá a República Dominicana</h2>

        <div class="impact-grid">
            <div class="impact-card">
                <div class="impact-icon">🌍</div>
                <div class="impact-title">Bilingüismo temprano garantizado</div>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-card">
                <div class="impact-icon">⚖️</div>
                <div class="impact-title">Reducción de brecha educativa</div>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-card">
                <div class="impact-icon">💼</div>
                <div class="impact-title">Preparación para economía global</div>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-card">
                <div class="impact-icon">🏫</div>
                <div class="impact-title">Fortalecimiento del sistema público</div>
            </div>
            <div class="impact-card">
                <div class="impact-icon">⭐</div>
                <div class="impact-title">Mejores oportunidades de vida</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     FINAL CTA
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section>
    <div class="container">
        <div class="final-cta">
            <div class="final-cta-content">
                <h2>El futuro de nuestros hijos <span>habla dos idiomas.</span><br>Eva Education<sup>©</sup> lo hace posible, hoy.</h2>
                <p>Invitamos a la comunidad educativa dominicana a ser parte de esta transformación pedagógica.</p>

                <div class="share-buttons">
                    <a href="#" class="share-btn whatsapp js-contact-whatsapp" id="contactMainBtn" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
                        Contactar a GFS Crew
                    </a>
                    <a href="#" class="share-btn primary" id="whatsappBtn" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
                        Compartir por WhatsApp
                    </a>
                        📤 Compartir esta página
                    </a>
                    <button class="share-btn outline" id="shareBtn">
                        🔗 Copiar Enlace
                    </button>

                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     FOOTER
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<footer>
    <div class="footer-brand">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Eva Education©">
        <span>Eva Education<sup>©</sup></span>
    </div>
    <p><strong>Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup></strong> — Tutora Bilingüe con Inteligencia Artificial</p>
    <p>Desarrollado por <strong>GFS Crew</strong></p>
    <p style="margin-top:12px; font-size:12px;">© 2026 GFS Crew. Todos los derechos reservados.</p>
    <div class="copyright-notice">
        Eva Education<sup>©</sup>, Mrs. Eva<sup>©</sup> y todos los elementos visuales, nombres, marcas y contenidos asociados son propiedad exclusiva de GFS Crew y están protegidos por las leyes de derechos de autor y propiedad intelectual. Prohibida su reproducción total o parcial sin autorización expresa.
    </div>
</footer>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTACTO DIRECTO CON GFS CREW
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<section class="contact-section">
    <div class="contact-card">
        <div class="contact-icon-large">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h3>Agenda una reunión de implementación</h3>
        <p>Nuestro equipo de <strong>GFS Crew</strong> está listo para coordinar una demostración presencial o virtual e iniciar la conversación de implementación en su sistema educativo.</p>
        <div class="contact-number">📱 +1 (787) 365-5241</div>
        <br>
        <a href="#" class="contact-btn-big js-contact-whatsapp" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
            Chatear ahora por WhatsApp
        </a>
        <div class="contact-note">Funciona con WhatsApp regular y WhatsApp Business</div>
    </div>
</section>

<!-- Floating WhatsApp contact button -->
<a href="#" class="floating-share" id="floatingWhatsapp" aria-label="Chatear con GFS Crew" title="Chatear con GFS Crew por WhatsApp" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51-.173-.008-.371-.01-.57-.01-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 01-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 01-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 012.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0012.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 005.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 00-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
</a>

<script>
    // Hide loader after 3.2 seconds
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        setTimeout(() => {
            document.getElementById('loader').classList.add('hidden');
        }, 3200);
    });

    // Also hide loader on user tap
    document.getElementById('loader').addEventListener('click', () => {
        document.getElementById('loader').classList.add('hidden');
    });

    // ===== WhatsApp URLs =====
    const pageUrl = window.location.href;

    // 1) DIRECT CONTACT with GFS Crew (opens chat with the number)
    const GFS_WHATSAPP = '17873655241'; // +1 (787) 365-5241
    const contactMessage = 'Hola GFS Crew, me interesa conocer más sobre Eva Education© para nuestro sistema educativo. Me gustaría coordinar una reunión.';
    const whatsappContactUrl = 'https://wa.me/' + GFS_WHATSAPP + '?text=' + encodeURIComponent(contactMessage);
    document.getElementById('floatingWhatsapp').href = whatsappContactUrl;
    document.querySelectorAll('.js-contact-whatsapp').forEach(el => { el.href = whatsappContactUrl; });

    // 2) SHARE this landing page with others
    const shareText = '🇩🇴 Conoce Mrs. Eva© — Tutora Bilingüe con IA que transformará el aula dominicana. Descúbrelo aquí: ';
    const whatsappShareUrl = 'https://wa.me/?text=' + encodeURIComponent(shareText + pageUrl);
    document.getElementById('whatsappBtn').href = whatsappShareUrl;

    // Copy link / Native share fallback
    document.getElementById('shareBtn').addEventListener('click', async () => {
        if (navigator.share) {
            try {
                await navigator.share({
                    title: 'Mrs. Eva© — Tutora Bilingüe AI',
                    text: shareText,
                    url: pageUrl
                });
                return;
            } catch (e) { /* fall through to copy */ }
        }
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(pageUrl).then(() => {
            const btn = document.getElementById('shareBtn');
            const original = btn.innerHTML;
            btn.innerHTML = '✅ ¡Enlace copiado!';
            setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = original; }, 2000);
        });
    });


</script>

<script defer src="https://static.cloudflareinsights.com/beacon.min.js/v4513226cdae34746b4dedf0b4dfa099e1781791509496" integrity="sha512-ZE9pZaUXND66v380QUtch/5sE9tPFh2zg45pR2PB0CVkCtOREv2AJKkSidISWkysEuQ0EH8faUU5du78bx87UQ==" data-cf-beacon='{"version":"2024.11.0","token":"4edd5f8ec12a48cfa682ab8261b80a79","server_timing":{"name":{"cfCacheStatus":true,"cfEdge":true,"cfExtPri":true,"cfL4":true,"cfOrigin":true,"cfSpeedBrain":true},"location_startswith":null}}' crossorigin="anonymous"></script>
</body>
</html>
